productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men White Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all white uppers with red and grey accents in a classic silhouette creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper with suede overlays for durability and comfortPerforations on the sides for greater breathabilitySuede panel overlays on the toe counter and behind the heel for greater protection to the feetPanel detailing on the sides for greater styleLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand tab on the side, appliqued on the tongue and printed behind collar MidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in terraced wave pattern on the forefoot for maximum durability and tractionDiamond pattern on the lateral side for extra gripBuilt up textured heel counter with small lug pattern for greater protection to the heelShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
